Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

I think this is the wrong fix. libcfs_init() should run first and only do what is required to make its services available.
libcfs_setup() should run afterwards, and ideally only when the services in libcfs are about to be used. 
If libcfs_init() needs debugging to be enabled, then it should enable debugging directly rather than having that happen in  libcfs_setup().  libcfs_setup() might then check if debugging was successfully enabled.

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1
> 
> I think this is the wrong fix. libcfs_init() should run first and only do what is required to make its services available.
> libcfs_setup() should run afterwards, and ideally only when the services in libcfs are about to be used. 
> If libcfs_init() needs debugging to be enabled, then it should enable debugging directly rather than having that happen in  libcfs_setup().  libcfs_setup() might then check if debugging was successfully enabled.

I think testing should be don't broken first. so alternative way - just revert bad patch.
as this patch had restore old behavior.

Patch Set 2:

> > libcfs_setup() should run afterwards, and ideally only when the services in libcfs are about to be used. 
> > If libcfs_init() needs debugging to be enabled, then it should enable debugging directly rather than having that happen in  libcfs_setup().  libcfs_setup() might then check if debugging was successfully enabled.
> 
> I think testing should be don't broken first. so alternative way - just revert bad patch.
> as this patch had restore old behavior.

I think Neil is suggesting is move libcfs_debug_init() from libcfs_setup() to libcfs_init().

James work on this issue.

commit.subject: LU-17418 libcfs: fix libcfs init.
commit.message:
LU-17418 libcfs: fix libcfs init.

Libcfs should make debug subsystem init while loading,
otherwise it caused a panic with debug settings if none other
modules loaded.

Fixes: f3494a6e9 ("LU-9859 libcfs: refactor libcfs initialization.")
Test-Parameters: trivial
HPe-bug-id: LUS-12080
Signed-off-by: Alexey Lyashkov <alexey.lyashkov@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I725bc3b09272fceb4d7b50550cae707fa64eb56a
